# LockIn Protocol — Open Source, No Monetization

LockIn Protocol is **open source** and **community-maintained**. There is no business model, no paid tiers, and no monetization. The project exists to provide commitment and accountability tooling for everyone; all documentation and code are oriented toward this non-commercial, non-crypto product.

If you or your organization wish to support development (e.g. donations or grants), that would be separate from the core product and documented elsewhere if adopted.
